steps.title: Identify the contrast structure
steps.content: The phrase “on the other hand” marks the sentence's primary function: it explains what horizontal gene transfer is by contrasting it directly with vertical gene transfer.

steps.title: Apply the contrast function to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined sentence explains one biological process by contrasting it with another related process—exactly what choice A describes. The other three either misidentify the sentence's purpose (B assigns the flawed-perception argument to the wrong sentence; C and D ignore the contrast structure entirely, with D even reversing it).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
